productDisplayName: Puma Men's Knit Polo Mazarine Blue Polo T-shirt
description: CompositionMazarine blue knit polo neck t-shirt with green, grey and white stripes, made of 100% cotton, has a half buttoned placket, brand embroidery on the chest in golden, vented hem and tight at the hemline for a jersey FitFittingSlimWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean puma does it again by twisting trend and transforming it into a stylish contemporary piece. Get into this classy polo t-shirt with a jersey fit at the hemline that sits snug on your waist and lends you a sporty look. The horizontal stripes make your broad frame look even manlier and the knitted cotton keeps you cool on hot days. Pair it with denims and funky sneakers for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
